items.title: Sudden realization:
items.author: Howard Beck
items.body_excerpt:
Sudden realization: 

Mike Brown's enthused/semi-cringey "Who Let the Dogs Out" performance at the Knicks' championship rally is the 2026 equivalent of Mark "Mad Dog" Madsen's enthused/semi-cringey dancing at the Lakers' 2000 championship rally. Discuss.

media.title: 660K views · 12K reactions | Mike Brown breaks out his signature "who let the dogs out" chant with Knicks fans! 📣  Knicks Championship Parade LIVE NOW on NBA TV and on the NBA App 🏆 Tap to Watch ➡️ https://link.nba.com/NYK-Parade-FB | NBA
media.description: Mike Brown breaks out his signature "who let the dogs out" chant with Knicks fans! 📣  Knicks Championship Parade LIVE NOW on NBA TV and on the NBA App 🏆 Tap to Watch ➡️ https://link.nba.com/NYK-Parade-FB

items.title: Kelsey Plum didn’t say what her left leg injury was when I spoke to her at practice but did say it was an “accumulation over time of heavy usage.” Plum said she participated in a bit of practice before media was let in to observe. Team expectation is that Plum will play Sunday.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Kelsey Plum didn’t say what her left leg injury was when I spoke to her at practice but did say it was an “accumulation over time of heavy usage.” Plum said she participated in a bit of practice before media was let in to observe. Team expectation is that Plum will play Sunday.

We recently added pre-official blocks, steals and turnovers for the early 1970s Seattle SuperSonics!

Basketball Reference now has blocks and steals totals for the 1971-1973 Sonics, as well as individual turnover totals for Seattle from 1971-1974.

Read all of the details from this addition! 👇

items.title: Rickea Jackson underwent successful surgery on her torn left anterior cruciate ligament, the Sky announced today.
items.author: Drew
items.body_excerpt:
Rickea Jackson underwent successful surgery on her torn left anterior cruciate ligament, the Sky announced today. 

She remains out for the rest of the 2026 season.

media.title: The N.J. Turnpike is expanding in South Jersey. Lawnside residents say the plan imperils an Underground Railroad stop.
media.description: Lawnside residents are uneasy as the Turnpike project encroaches on the historic Peter Mott house, a 200-year-old home believed to have served as refuge for enslaved people traveling from the South.

June 19, 1988: CBS' Pat O'Brien with a pair of Detroit Pistons "shoe reports" during Game 6 of the NBA Finals.

—John Salley is playing with $6 in cash inside his shoes
